name: honeypot
description: Containerized low/medium-interaction honeypot for malicious IP tracking and analytics.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n r2,webtrap,tcp,dashboard -c blue,yellow,cyan,green "npm run dev -w @honeypot/r2-writer" "npm run dev -w @honeypot/trap-web" "npm run dev -w @honeypot/tcp-traps" "npm run dev -w @honeypot/dashboard"
scripts.dev:vps: concurrently -n r2,webtrap,tcp -c blue,yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w @honeypot/r2-writer" "npm run dev -w @honeypot/trap-web" "npm run dev -w @honeypot/tcp-traps"
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
